fields.title: Update review agent: JSON output, confidence scores, read-only sandbox
fields.description:
Update the review agent definition in extensions/tau/agents/review.md.

## Changes

### 1. Model: use pi config model
Keep `model: inherit` — this already means 'use whatever model the parent pi session has configured'. No change needed here.

### 2. JSON output schema
Add a strict JSON output schema to the system prompt (matching codex's approach). Schema:
```json
{
  "findings": [
    {
      "title": "<≤ 80 chars, imperative, prefixed with [P0]-[P3]>",
      "body": "<Markdown explaining why this is a problem; cite files/lines/functions>",
      "confidence_score": <float 0.0-1.0>,
      "priority": <int 0-3>,
      "code_location": {
        "absolute_file_path": "<file path>",
        "line_range": {"start": <int>, "end": <int>}
      }
    }
  ],
  "overall_correctness": "patch is correct" | "patch is incorrect",
  "overall_explanation": "<1-3 sentence justification>",
  "overall_confidence_score": <float 0.0-1.0>
}
```
Add rules: do not wrap JSON in markdown fences, do not generate a PR fix, code_location must overlap with diff, line ranges as short as possible.

### 3. Confidence scores
Already included in the schema above — per-finding `confidence_score` + `overall_confidence_score`.

### 4. Read-only sandbox
Use `sandbox_preset: read-only` in frontmatter (replaces the legacy `sandbox_fs`/`sandbox_net`/`approval_policy` fields).
The read-only preset gives: filesystemMode=read-only, networkMode=deny, approvalPolicy=on-request.
Remove the legacy sandbox fields.

## File to change
- `extensions/tau/agents/review.md` — frontmatter + system prompt body

## Quality gate
Run `npm run gate` from extensions/tau/
fields.close_reason: Already implemented in parallel branch: JSON output schema, confidence scores, sandbox preset, model inherit all present in review.md
